---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for Eudora
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## 💡 Feature Description
A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see added.

## 🤔 Problem It Solves
Describe the problem this feature would solve, or why it would be useful.

## 📐 Proposed Solution
How do you think this should work? Feel free to describe it step by step.

## 🔗 Alternatives Considered
Any alternative approaches you've thought of.

## 📋 Additional Context
Any other details, references, or screenshots that might help explain your idea.
